name: Duck with Apple Dressing
recipeIngredient: 3 large Apples [peeled, cored and diced fine]
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the duck and pat dry inside and out.
2. Combine the remaining ingredients, except the bacon, in a bowl and mix well. Spoon the dressing into all cavities of the duck and place in a baking dish.
3. Place the bacon strips over the top and bake in a 350°F oven until the duck is tender.
4. Serve with wild rice and favorite vegetables.
